mapper.insert: insert into t_env_fees (fee_id, ent_code, project_id, fee_code, fee_type, fee_amount, payment_date, status, fee_desc) values (#{feeId}, #{entCode}, #{projectId}, #{feeCode}, #{feeType}, #{feeAmount}, #{paymentDate}, #{status}, #{feeDesc})
mapper.select: select count(*) from t_env_fee_payments where fee_id = #{feeId}
select count(*) from t_env_fee_invoices where fee_id = #{feeId}
mapper.update: update t_env_fees set invoice_amount = coalesce(( select sum( case when invoice_status = 1 then coalesce(invoice_amount, 0) + coalesce(tax_amount, 0) when invoice_status = 2 then -(coalesce(invoice_amount, 0) + coalesce(tax_amount, 0)) else 0 end ) from t_env_fee_invoices where fee_id = #{feeId} ), 0) where fee_id = #{feeId}

update t_env_fees set payment_amount = coalesce(( select sum( case when payment_status = 'PARTIAL_REFUND' then coalesce(payment_amount, 0) - coalesce(refund_amount, 0) when payment_status = 'COMPLETED' then coalesce(payment_amount, 0) else 0 end ) from t_env_fee_payments where fee_id = #{feeId} and payment_status in ('COMPLETED', 'PARTIAL_REFUND') ), 0) where fee_id = #{feeId}
